attributes.additional_details:
This petition is to lobby the government and demand a general election please share with everyone in the UK to sign snd show them we mean business!  

If King Charles reads this you have the power to be a legend! You can dissolve parliament your British people would absolutely love you for this! 

We demand a General Election immediately!!!!!!

Let us have a say!!!!!!
attributes.background:
The Labour government are moving away from their general election promise of respecting the 2016 referendum where leave the EU was decided. 
The public sent a clear message in recent council elections that Labour has lost touch with the UK public.
We demand a General Election immediately!!!!!!

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now! https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
